reasoning: The control SI-4 (11) focuses on analyzing communications traffic anomalies, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through network policy monitoring, audit logging of network traffic anomalies, and service mesh traffic monitoring. Kubernetes NetworkPolicies can be used to define allowed traffic patterns, and deviations from these patterns can be considered anomalies. Audit logs can capture network traffic anomalies if configured properly. Service meshes like Istio can provide detailed traffic monitoring and anomaly detection capabilities.
title: System Monitoring | Analyze Communications Traffic Anomalies
